name: @act-spec/example-starlight-docs
description: Minimal Astro Starlight starter that emits a conformant ACT (Agent Content Tree) tree alongside its static build via @act-spec/plugin-astro.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-starlight-docs: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-starlight-docs: lint covered by Astro at build time')"
